data.title: Omdia: India’s smartphone shipments fell 5% in 1Q26 amid channel caution and pricing pressures
data.description: In London, according to recent research by Omdia, smartphone shipments in India dropped by 5% year-on-year to 30.9 million units in the first quarter of 2026. This decline reflects a combination of weak seasonal demand and cautious inventory strategies among channels. The decrease in demand can be attributed to various macroeconomic challenges such as rupee depreciation and increasing inflation, which have impacted affordability and led to delayed consumer upgrades. Furthermore, preemptive stockpiling in anticipation of price hikes also constrained additional channel acquisitions. Notably, vivo maintained its market share amidst these challenging conditions.
JPMorgan lowers target price on Baltic Classifieds Group plc to 178p, down from 182p.

data.title: RVezy Wins 2025 Stevie Award for Customer Service Department of the Year
data.description: RVezy, a rapidly expanding peer-to-peer RV rental platform, has achieved a significant accomplishment by outperforming over 2,100 global organizations to win a prestigious customer service award within the travel industry. This recognition not only highlights the company's commitment to providing exceptional care but also signifies its growing presence in the thriving RV rental market in California. The award was received on April 20, 2026, in Ottawa, ON.
New Zealand’s RBNZ sectoral factor model shows inflation at +2.7% YoY in Q1.

data.title: Cadonilimab Combination Demonstrates Promising Survival Benefit in Locally Advanced Pancreatic Cancer: Phase II COMPASSION-26 Data Presented at AACR 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Hong Kong, Akeso, Inc. disclosed promising findings from the COMPASSION-26 trial. The study looked into cadonilimab, a novel PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody by the Company. The results from Phase II showed favorable outcomes when cadonilimab was used alongside chemotherapy as a first-line treatment. Akeso, Inc., listed as 9926.HK, referred to the antibody as their initial venture into this treatment realm.

data.title: Chesapeake Utilities to Host its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on May 7, 2026
data.description: Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) is set to hold a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to review its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The official earnings report is scheduled to be released on April 20, 2026. Stay tuned for updates on their quarterly results and insights into their financial status during the call.

data.title: Trinsic Residential Group Announces Minority Investment by Haseko Corporation
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Trinsic Residential Group, a prominent developer of multifamily residential real estate, disclosed a minority investment from Haseko Corporation via its subsidiary, Haseko North America, Inc. This investment marks a significant step in the collaboration between the two entities.

data.title: Singapore imagines new ways of living at Milan Design Week with the opening of Prototype Island
data.description: Fifteen carefully selected pieces highlight the unique design strategies of the country, examining creative solutions to urgent global issues related to living spaces and global environments. The exhibition, Prototype Island, organized by the DesignSingapore Council, commences today at Foro.
